display.purpose: Hero headlines only. One per page.

label.purpose: Section labels and button text. Uppercase.

shadows.name: hover-low
shadows.purpose: Primary button hover — Signal Violet glow.

shadows.name: hover-card-default
shadows.purpose: Pricing card hover — deeper shadow for featured tier.

shadows.name: featured-glow
shadows.purpose: Featured pricing card — rest state ring + glow.

motion.name: ease-spring
motion.purpose: Default easing for all state transitions and reveals.

motion.name: duration-fast
motion.purpose: Color, opacity, and simple state transitions.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Signal Violet gradient pill — primary CTA on hero, pricing, and bottom CTA sections.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; padding: 14px 32px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #8b5cf6, #7c3aed); color: #fff; border: none; border-radius: 9999px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none; line-height: 1.4; transition: all 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { transform: translateY(-3px); box-shadow: 0 12px 40px rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.45); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #8b5cf6; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary span, .ds-btn-primary svg { position: relative; z-index: 1; } .ds-btn-primary svg { width: 16px; height: 16px; }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Ghost outline — secondary CTA, disabled/current plan state.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; padding: 14px 32px; background: transparent; color: #fff; border: 1px solid #27272a; border-radius: 9999px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none; transition: all 0.2s; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { border-color: #a1a1aa; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.04); } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #8b5cf6; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Dark card background with subtle border; purple glow on focus.
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; padding: 14px 16px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; border: 1px solid #27272a; border-radius: 8px; background: #141414; color: #fff; outline: none; transition: border-color 0.2s; box-sizing: border-box; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #8b5cf6; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.15); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #71717a; }

components.name: Service Card
components.description: Feature/service card with Signal Violet top-border glow on hover.
components.html:
Feature Name

Short description of what this feature does and why it matters.
components.css: .ds-card { padding: 32px; background: #141414; border: 1px solid #27272a; border-radius: 12px; transition: all 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); position: relative; overflow: hidden; } .ds-card::before { content: ''; position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; height: 2px; background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, #8b5cf6, transparent); opacity: 0; transition: opacity 0.4s; } .ds-card:hover { border-color: rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.4); background: #1a1a1a; transform: translateY(-6px); box-shadow: 0 20px 60px rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.12); } .ds-card:hover::before { opacity: 1; } .ds-card-icon { width: 48px; height: 48px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; border-radius: 8px; background: rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.08); border: 1px solid rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.15); margin-bottom: 20px; color: #8b5cf6; transition: all 0.3s; } .ds-card:hover .ds-card-icon { background: rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.15); transform: scale(1.05); } .ds-card-title { font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 600; margin: 0 0 8px; color: #fff; position: relative; z-index: 1; } .ds-card-desc { font-size: 0.9rem; line-height: 1.6; color: #a1a1aa; margin: 0; position: relative; z-index: 1; }

components.name: Pricing Card (Featured)
components.description: Featured pricing card with Signal Violet border, scale, and badge.
components.html:
Most Popular
Business Plan
$29
/ month
  • ✓ Up to 10 vCards
  • ✓ Custom domains
  • ✓ Analytics
  • — Priority support
components.css: .ds-price-card.featured { padding: 32px; background: #141414; border: 1px solid #8b5cf6; border-radius: 12px; position: relative; transform: scale(1.02); z-index: 1; box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.1), 0 20px 60px rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.1); transition: all 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-price-card.featured:hover { transform: scale(1.02) translateY(-8px); box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.2), 0 24px 64px rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.15); } .ds-price-badge { position: absolute; top: -12px; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%); background: linear-gradient(135deg, #8b5cf6, #7c3aed); color: white; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; padding: 5px 18px; border-radius: 9999px; box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.4); white-space: nowrap; } .ds-price-name { font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 16px; color: #fff; } .ds-price-amount { font-size: clamp(2rem, 3vw, 2.5rem); font-weight: 800; letter-spacing: -0.03em; margin-bottom: 4px; color: #fff; } .ds-price-period { font-size: 0.875rem; color: #71717a; margin-bottom: 24px; } .ds-price-features { list-style: none; padding: 0; margin: 0 0 24px; display: grid; gap: 10px; } .ds-price-features li { font-size: 0.9rem; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; color: #a1a1aa; } .ds-price-features .check { color: #22c55e; } .ds-price-features .muted { color: #71717a; } .ds-price-card.featured .ds-btn-primary { width: 100%; }

components.name: Testimonial Card
components.description: Testimonial with floating quote mark and author avatar.
components.html:
This platform completely changed how I share my professional identity. Simple, fast, and stunning.
Sarah Chen
components.css: .ds-testimonial { padding: 32px; background: #141414; border: 1px solid #27272a; border-radius: 12px; transition: all 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); position: relative; } .ds-testimonial:hover { border-color: rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.3); transform: translateY(-4px); box-shadow: 0 16px 48px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2); } .ds-testimonial::before { content: '\201C'; position: absolute; top: 20px; right: 24px; font-size: 3rem; font-family: Georgia, serif; color: rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.12); line-height: 1; pointer-events: none; } .ds-testimonial blockquote { margin: 0 0 24px; font-size: 0.9375rem; line-height: 1.7; color: #a1a1aa; font-style: italic; position: relative; z-index: 1; } .ds-testimonial-author { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; position: relative; z-index: 1; } .ds-testimonial-author img { width: 44px; height: 44px; border-radius: 50%; object-fit: cover; border: 2px solid #27272a; transition: border-color 0.3s; } .ds-testimonial:hover .ds-testimonial-author img { border-color: #8b5cf6; } .ds-testimonial-author strong { font-size: 0.9rem; font-weight: 600; color: #fff; }

components.name: Navigation Link (Dark Header)
components.description: Transparent header nav link — dim at rest, white on hover.
components.html: HomeAboutPricingContactSign In
components.css: .ds-nav-link { font-family: Inter, system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9rem; font-weight: 500; color: #a1a1aa; text-decoration: none; transition: color 0.2s; } .ds-nav-link:hover { color: #ffffff; } .ds-nav-link.active { color: #ffffff; } .ds-nav-cta { background: #ffffff; color: #0a0a0a; border-radius: 9999px; font-weight: 600; padding: 10px 24px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9rem; text-decoration: none; transition: opacity 0.2s; } .ds-nav-cta:hover { opacity: 0.9; }

components.name: Contact Info Item
components.description: Contact detail row with icon — slides right on hover.
components.html: hello@qrenda.com
components.css: .ds-contact-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 16px; padding: 16px 20px; background: #141414; border: 1px solid #27272a; border-radius: 8px; transition: all 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-contact-item:hover { border-color: rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.25); background: #1a1a1a; transform: translateX(4px); } .ds-contact-icon { width: 44px; height: 44px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; border-radius: 8px; background: rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.08); border: 1px solid rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.15); color: #8b5cf6; flex-shrink: 0; font-size: 1rem; transition: all 0.3s; } .ds-contact-item:hover .ds-contact-icon { background: rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.18); transform: scale(1.05); } .ds-contact-item span { font-size: 0.9375rem; color: #a1a1aa; transition: color 0.2s; } .ds-contact-item:hover span { color: #fff; }

narrative.overview:
Dark as a night sky. Signal Violet as a beacon. Everything is built around that one strong signal — precise, warm, unmistakable. The interface doesn't shout; it glows.

Crisp and human — a dark interface that doesn't feel cold. The purple accent brings warmth; typography brings clarity. Professional without being sterile. Every element earns its place; the purple accent is rare and therefore powerful. Typography carries the hierarchy, not decoration.

This system explicitly rejects: SaaS cliché templates (identical card grids, gradient text, hero-metric numbers, beige/sand/warm-neutral body backgrounds), editorial-magazine aesthetics, glassmorphism, side-stripe borders, and the tiny-uppercase-tracked-eyebrow pattern repeated above every section.
keyCharacteristics: Dark tonal surface hierarchy (bg → surface → card → card-hover) as the sole depth mechanism at rest
A single luminous purple accent (Signal Violet) used on ≤15% of any screen
Generous, fluid typography with Inter as the sole family
Tactile, weighted interactions — buttons lift, cards float, inputs glow on focus
Reduced motion respected; motion is choreographed for the hero load then scroll-reveals that feel earned

rules.name: The Signal Rule
rules.body: Signal Violet occupies ≤15% of any viewport. Its rarity is the source of its power. If a section needs more color, it's a sign the composition isn't carrying its weight.

rules.name: The Dark Concrete Rule
rules.body: All neutrals lean cool and matte. No warm undertones, no glossy surfaces. The dark is a material, not an absence.

rules.name: The One Step Rule
rules.body: Never use more than two steps from the hierarchy on any single card or section. If Display is present, nothing else above it competes.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Shadows appear only as a response to state (hover, focus, active). The tonal hierarchy does the layering work.

dos: Do use Signal Violet sparingly. If a section has more than one colored element (not counting default borders), it's too much.
Do use the pill shape for all buttons. It's the system's most recognizable silhouette.
Do rely on the tonal hierarchy (bg → surface → card → card-hover) for depth. Shadows are for interaction states only.
Do keep body text at #a1a1aa (--q-text-dim) or brighter. Muted text (#71717a) is for placeholders, footnotes, and secondary metadata only.
Do cap hero heading size at clamp(2.5rem, 5.5vw, 4rem). Above that, the page is shouting.
Do use text-wrap: balance on display and headline text. Wrap is a feature, not a bug.
Do use the q-reveal scroll animation system for section entrances, with the q-reveal-visible class toggled by intersection observer. Include a 0.5s CSS fallback for renderers that can't run JS.
Do test heading copy at every breakpoint. If it overflows on tablet or mobile, reduce the clamp max.
Do respect prefers-reduced-motion: transform all reveals, hovers, and entrances to instant transitions.
donts: Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text with a gradient). Use solid white or Signal Violet.
Don't add side-stripe borders (border-left or border-right > 1px as a colored accent). Use full borders, background tints, or nothing.
Don't use glassmorphism or decorative backdrop-filter blurs.
Don't repeat tiny uppercase tracked labels above every section. One strong kicker per page is voice; more than one is AI scaffolding.
Don't use numbered section markers (01, 02, 03) as decorative scaffolding.
Don't use beige, sand, cream, or warm-neutral body backgrounds. This system's surface IS the dark concrete.
Don't use hero-metric templates (big number, small label, supporting stats, gradient accent).
Don't use identical card grids with icon + heading + text repeated endlessly. Vary the grid shape.
Don't use monospace fonts as shorthand for 'technical.' This brand isn't technical; mono reads as costume.
Don't render dropdown navigation inside an overflow: hidden container. Use the native popover API, position: fixed, or a portal.
Don't gate content visibility behind a class-triggered transition. Scroll reveals must enhance an already-visible default.
